root.sql:
SELECT PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_name( sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no ) as membername , sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no , sc_lon_m_rule.ref_contract_no as loan_type , FPB_GET_LOAN_TYPE_DESC(sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type) as loan_type_description, sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no , sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_payment_type_code , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_approve_amount , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_installment_amount , sc_lon_m_contract.period_payment_amount , sc_lon_m_contract.start_keep_date , (CASE sc_lon_m_contract.rec_rep_status WHEN '1' THEN sc_lon_m_contract.real_recieve ELSE 0 END) as real_recieve , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no , sc_lon_m_contract.appove_officer , sc_lon_m_contract.rec_rep_status,
sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.bank_acc_no ,
sc_lon_m_loan_request.salary_amount , sc_lon_m_loan_request.entry_id ,
sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.control_id
,sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.sort_order ,sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id ,sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_name
,( SELECT sum( sc_com_m_receipt_item.principal_amount ) FROM sc_com_m_receipt, sc_com_m_receipt_item WHERE ( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no ) AND ( sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id in( 'CLR' , 'TRL' ) ) AND ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = 'PL' ) AND ( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status = '0' ) ) as principal_amount
,( SELECT sum( sc_com_m_receipt_item.interest_amount ) FROM sc_com_m_receipt, sc_com_m_receipt_item WHERE ( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no ) AND ( sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id in( 'CLR' , 'TRL' ) ) AND ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = 'PL' ) AND ( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status = '0' ) ) as interest_amount
,( SELECT sum( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount ) FROM sc_com_m_receipt, sc_com_m_receipt_item WHERE ( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no ) AND ( sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id in( 'CLR' , 'TRL' ) ) AND ( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status = '0' ) ) as item_amount
,si_security_user.user_name as paid_name ,sc_lon_m_rule.account_id FROM sc_lon_m_loan_request , sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group , sc_lon_m_rule , sc_lon_m_contract , sc_com_m_ucf_money_type , si_security_user , sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid WHERE ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type ) and sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id = sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.type_pay_money and si_security_user.user_id = sc_lon_m_contract.appove_officer -- and sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract = '19/01/2022' and sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.type_pay_money = 'CSH' and sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no /*WHERE*/ order by sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type, sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no

r_ktm_loan_paid_cash_nest.sql:
SELECT tab_data.account_id, tab_data.account_name,
tab_data.principal_amount, tab_data.interest_amount, tab_data.item_amount from ( /* เงินกู้ */ SELECT sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id, sc_acc_m_account_master.account_name, sum( sc_com_m_receipt_item.principal_amount ) as principal_amount, sum( sc_com_m_receipt_item.interest_amount ) as interest_amount, sum( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount) as item_amount , sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date as receipt_date , sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id as money_type_id ,sc_com_m_receipt.branch_id as branch_id FROM sc_com_m_receipt, sc_com_m_receipt_item, sc_lon_m_rule, sc_acc_m_account_master, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type ,sc_lon_m_contract ,sc_com_m_ucf_money_type ,sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid WHERE ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type ) and ( sc_lon_m_rule.account_id = sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status = '0' ) AND ( sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item = 'LON' ) AND ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount <> 0 ) and sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = sc_com_m_receipt.loan_contract_no and sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id = sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.type_pay_money and sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no GROUP BY sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id, sc_acc_m_account_master.account_name, sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date , sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id ,sc_com_m_receipt.branch_id union
SELECT sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id as account_id , sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_name as account_name , sum( sc_com_m_receipt_item.principal_amount ) as principal_amount, sum( sc_com_m_receipt_item.interest_amount ) as interest_amount, sum( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount) as item_amount , sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date as receipt_date , sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id as money_type_id ,sc_com_m_receipt.branch_id as branch_id FROM sc_com_m_receipt, sc_com_m_receipt_item, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type ,sc_lon_m_contract ,sc_com_m_ucf_money_type ,sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid WHERE ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status = '0' ) AND ( sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item <> 'LON' ) AND ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount <> 0 ) and sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = sc_com_m_receipt.loan_contract_no and sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id = sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.type_pay_money and sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no GROUP BY sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_name , sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date , sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id ,sc_com_m_receipt.branch_id
) tab_data , sc_fin_m_close_day ,sc_com_m_ucf_money_type ,sc_com_m_branch where sc_fin_m_close_day.journal_date = tab_data.receipt_date and sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id = tab_data.money_type_id and sc_fin_m_close_day.journal_date = {0} and sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id = 'CSH'
and sc_com_m_branch.branch_id = sc_fin_m_close_day.branch_fin and sc_com_m_branch.branch_id = tab_data.branch_id

r_ktm_loan_paid_cash_nest_loan_old.sql:
SELECT sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no, sc_com_m_receipt_item.description, sc_com_m_receipt_item.principal_amount, sc_com_m_receipt_item.interest_amount, sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.sort_order FROM sc_com_m_receipt, sc_com_m_receipt_item, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type
WHERE ( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id ) and ( ( sc_com_m_receipt.loan_contract_no = {0} ) AND ( sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id in( 'CLR' , 'TRL' ) ) AND ( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status = '0' ) ) order by sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.sort_order , sc_com_m_receipt_item.description
